verse.name: v1
verse.lines: King of my life I crown Thee now, Thine shall the glory be; Lest I forget Thy thorn-crowned brow, Lead me to Calvary.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Lest I forget Gethsemane, Lest I forget Thine agony, Lest I forget Thy love for me, Lead me to Calvary.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Show me the tomb where Thou wast laid, Tenderly mourned and wept: Angels in robes of light arrayed, Guarded Thee whilst Thou slept.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Let me, like Mary, through the gloom, Come with a gift to Thee: Show to me now the empty tomb, Lead me to Calvary.

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: May I be willing, Lord, to bear, Daily my cross for Thee: Even Thy cup of grief to share, Thou hast borne all for me.

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: Fill me, Oh Lord, with Thy desire, For all who know not Thee: Then touch my lips with holy fire, To speak of Calvary.
